EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRay

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to 3D Ray properties and methods. A ray has one endpoint (its origin) and continues infinitely in one direction.

[Guid("0CD38CBA-1C89-11D4-9F5C-00C04F6BDF0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRay : IGeometry

bool

Origin

The origin point of the ray.

IPoint Origin { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Vector

The direction vector of the ray.
